summary: Backend push notification system testing completed successfully. All 27 test cases passed covering: device token registration/update/unregistration, FCM configuration validation, scheduler status, test notification endpoint, daily notification trigger, MongoDB persistence, and timezone configuration.
passed_tests: GET /api/notification_status - Returns 200 with FCM config, scheduler info, device count, and daily tip preview
POST /api/register_device - Successfully registers new device tokens
POST /api/register_device - Updates existing tokens with new trimester/platform info
POST /api/register_device - Validates trimester range 1-3 (422 for invalid)
POST /api/test_notification - Accepts test notification requests (FCM rejects fake tokens as expected)
POST /api/trigger_daily_notification - Successfully triggers daily notification job
Scheduler configured for Africa/Dar_es_Salaam timezone at 15:00 (3:00 PM)
MongoDB persistence - Tokens stored and retrieved correctly
MongoDB uniqueness - Duplicate tokens update existing entry, not create new
FCM configured with project ID: whattoeat-5f53f
Daily tip rotation returns valid tip structure with title/body/data
critical_code_review_comments: Code review passed - Error handling is comprehensive with proper logging
FCM HTTP v1 API implementation correctly detects invalid/unregistered tokens
APNs production environment correctly configured in FCM message payload
Scheduler uses correct timezone (Africa/Dar_es_Salaam) with CronTrigger
seed_data_creation: Test tokens prefixed with TEST_FCM_TOKEN_ created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Push notification backend fully tested. All 6 endpoints working: /api/register_device, /api/unregister_device/{token}, /api/notification_status, /api/test_notification, /api/trigger_daily_notification. FCM configured with Firebase project whattoeat-5f53f. Scheduler running at 3:00 PM Africa/Dar_es_Salaam. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_push_notifications.py can be reused for regression testing.

features_verified.device_token_registration: Working - new tokens stored, existing tokens updated
features_verified.fcm_configuration: Working - credentials loaded, project ID verified
features_verified.test_notification: Working - FCM correctly rejects invalid tokens
features_verified.mongodb_persistence: Working - unique index enforced, CRUD operations verified
features_verified.daily_tip_rotation: Working - tips rotate based on day of year
